Title: The Lord is My Shepherd
Berean Standard Bible: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
WLC: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד יְהוָה רֹעִי לֹא אֶחְסָר

Title: Green Pastures and Still Waters
Berean Standard Bible: He makes me lie down in green pastures; He leads me beside quiet waters.
WLC: בִּנְאוֹת דֶּשֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵנִי עַל־מֵי מְנֻחוֹת יְנַהֲלֵנִי

Title: Restoring the Soul
Berean Standard Bible: He restores my soul; He guides me in the paths of righteousness for the sake of His name.
WLC: נַפְשִׁי יְשׁוֹבֵב יַנְחֵנִי בְמַעְגְּלֵי־צֶדֶק לְמַעַן שְׁמוֹ

Title: The Valley of the Shadow of Death
Berean Standard Bible: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for You are with me; Your rod and Your staff, they comfort me.
WLC: גַּם כִּי־אֵלֵךְ בְּגֵיא צַלְמָוֶת לֹא־אִירָא רָע כִּי־אַטָּה עִמָּדִי שִׁבְטְךָ וּמִשְׁעַנְתֶּךָ הֵמָּה יְנַחֲמֻנִי

Title: A Table Prepared
Berean Standard Bible: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows.
WLC: תַּעֲרֹךְ לְפָנַי שֻׁלְחָן נֶגֶד צֹרְרָי דִּשַּׁנְתָּ בַשֶּׁמֶן רֹאשִׁי כּוֹסִי רְוָיָה

Title: Goodness and Mercy
Berean Standard Bible: Surely goodness and mercy will follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever.
WLC: אַךְ טוֹב וָחֶסֶד יִרְדְּפוּנִי כֹּל יְמֵי חַיָּי וְשַׁבְתִּי בְּבֵית־יְהוָה לְאֹרֶךְ יָמִים
